title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CEBU, TO BE KNOWN AS NAGA GENERAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4168 / 69 OG No. 9, 1624 (February 26, 1973)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6622, October 23, 1972 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A GENERAL HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF NAGA, PROVINCE OF CEBU, TO BE KNOWN AS NAGA GENERAL HOSPITAL, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established under the direct supervision of the Director of Medical Services, a general hospital in the Municipality of Naga, Province of Cebu, to be known as Naga General Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of five hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said hospital during the fiscal year nineteen hundred seventy-two. Thereafter, such sum as may be needed for its operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

GIL J. PUYAT

CORNELIO T. VILLAREAL

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

Finally passed by the Senate on September 11, 1972.

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was

finally passed by the same on May 8, 1972.

ELISEO M. TENZA

INOCENCIO B. PAREJA

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House Representatives

Approved: October 23, 1972

FERDINAND E. MARCOS

President of the Philippines
